glosses.yue: 好可能嘅; 有可能嘅
glosses.vi: có khả năng; có thể xảy ra
glosses.ja: ありそうな; 起こりそうな

sentences.target: La pluie est probable cet après-midi.

translations.fr: La pluie est probable cet après-midi.
translations.es: Es probable que llueva esta tarde.
translations.it: È probabile che piova questo pomeriggio.
translations.ko: 오늘 오후에 비가 올 가능성이 높습니다.
translations.pt: É provável que chova esta tarde.
translations.tr: Bugün öğleden sonra yağmur olması muhtemel.
translations.vi: Chiều nay có khả năng sẽ mưa.
translations.ar: من المرجح أن تمطر بعد ظهر اليوم.
translations.hi: आज दोपहर बारिश होने की संभावना है.
translations.el: Είναι πιθανό να βρέξει το απόγευμα.
translations.nb: Det blir sannsynligvis regn i ettermiddag.
translations.id: Kemungkinan akan turun hujan sore ini.
translations.sv: Det blir troligen regn i eftermiddag.
translations.da: Det vil sandsynligvis regne i eftermiddag.
translations.ja: 今日の午後は雨になりそうです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determines ‘pluie’ and agrees in gender/number.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP; subject of ‘est’.
Copula, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; singular; agrees with ‘pluie’ and states likelihood.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular form used before vowel/h muet; modifies ‘après-midi’.
Noun (often masculine; here singular); head of the temporal complement NP ‘cet après-midi’.

sentences.target: Un retard est probable sur cette ligne.
sentences.reading: /œ̃ ʁətaʁ ɛ pʁɔbabl syʁ sɛt liɲ/

translations.fr: Un retard est probable sur cette ligne.
translations.ipa: /œ̃ ʁətaʁ ɛ pʁɔbabl syʁ sɛt liɲ/
translations.en: A delay is likely on this line.
translations.es: Es probable que haya retraso en esta línea.
translations.de: Auf dieser Linie ist eine Verspätung wahrscheinlich.
translations.it: È probabile un ritardo su questa linea.
translations.pt: É provável que haja atraso nesta linha.
translations.vi: Tuyến này có khả năng bị chậm.
translations.ar: من المرجح حدوث تأخير على هذا الخط.
translations.nl: Op deze lijn is wahrscheinlich vertraging.
translations.hu: Ezen a vonalon valószínű késés várható.
translations.hi: इस लाइन पर देरी की संभावना है.
translations.pl: Na tej linii prawdopodobne jest opóźnienie.
translations.el: Σε αυτή τη γραμμή είναι πιθανή καθυστέρηση.
translations.nb: Det er sannsynlig med forsinkelser på denne linjen.
translations.id: Kemungkinan akan terjadi keterlambatan di jalur ini.
translations.sv: Det är sannolikt med förseningar på den här linjen.
translations.ro: Este probabil să apară întârzieri pe această linie.
translations.cs: Na této lince je pravděpodobné zpoždění.
translations.da: Der er sandsynligvis forsinkelser på denne linje.
translations.ja: この路線では遅延が起きる可能性があります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP; subject of ‘est’.
Copula, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; singular; agrees with ‘retard’ and expresses likelihood.
Preposition; introduces PP ‘sur cette ligne’; indicates the domain/location.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘ligne’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘sur’; refers to a route/line.

translations.vi: Tôi nghĩ điều đó có khả năng.
translations.nl: Ik denk dat dat waarschijnlijk is.
translations.hi: मुझे लगता है कि यह संभावित है.
translations.id: Saya pikir itu kemungkinan besar terjadi.
translations.sv: Jag tror att det är sannolikt.
translations.ja: それは起こりそうだと思います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular clitic; subject of ‘trouve’.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes a direct object and an adjectival complement.
Demonstrative pronoun (colloquial form of ‘cela’); direct object of ‘trouve’.
Object complement (predicative of ‘ça’); expresses the speaker’s judgment.

sentences.target: Le report est probable selon le médecin.
sentences.reading: /lə ʁəpɔʁ ɛ pʁɔbabl səlɔ̃ lə medsɛ̃/

translations.fr: Le report est probable selon le médecin.
translations.ipa: /lə ʁəpɔʁ ɛ pʁɔbabl səlɔ̃ lə medsɛ̃/
translations.en: A postponement is likely, according to the doctor.
translations.es: Según el médico, es probable que se posponga.
translations.de: Laut dem Arzt ist eine Verschiebung wahrscheinlich.
translations.it: Secondo il medico, è probabile un rinvio.
translations.pt: Segundo o médico, é provável que haja um adiamento.
translations.vi: Theo bác sĩ, việc hoãn lại là có khả năng.
translations.ar: بحسب الطبيب، من المرجح حدوث تأجيل.
translations.nl: Volgens de arts is uitstel waarschijnlijk.
translations.hu: Az orvos szerint valószínű a halasztás.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर के अनुसार स्थगन की संभावना है.
translations.el: Σύμφωνα με τον γιατρό, είναι πιθανή αναβολή.
translations.id: Menurut dokter, penundaan kemungkinan besar terjadi.
translations.sv: Enligt läkaren är en uppskjutning sannolik.
translations.da: Ifølge lægen er en udskydelse sandsynlig.
translations.ja: 医師によると、延期の可能性が高いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘report’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP; subject of ‘est’.
Copula, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; singular; agrees with ‘report’ and expresses likelihood.
Preposition; introduces a source PP ‘selon le médecin’.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘médecin’.
Common noun (epicene, here masculine), singular; object of ‘selon’; denotes the source.
